# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Test Contributions

on:
  pull_request_target:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          yarn install
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm run test
      - name: Post results as comment
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/github-script@v3
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const {data} = await github.issues.createComment({
              ...context.repo,
              issue_number: pr.number,
              body: "Tests failed! Check the logs for more information.",
            });
          if: success()
        uses: actions/github-script@v3
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;
            const {data} = await github.issues.createComment({
              ...context.repo,
              issue_number: pr.number,
              body: "Tests passed! Your contribution has been accepted.",
            });
